infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RoveXP uses your location to surface nearby quests and verify on-site check-ins.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RoveXP uses your camera so you can attach proof photos to completed quest reviews.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RoveXP lets you attach optional photos when you review a completed quest.
